test.create_query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t_filter_column_vector ( id UInt32, u8 UInt8, u16 UInt16, u32 UInt32, u64 UInt64, bf16 BFloat16, f32 Float32, f64 Float64, uuid UUID, ipv4 IPv4 ) ENGINE = Memory();
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO t_filter_column_vector WITH number as x SELECT rand() % 1000 id, toUInt8(x) u8, toUInt16(x) u16, toUInt32(x) u32, toUInt64(x) u64, toBFloat16(x) bf16, toFloat32(x) f32, toFloat64(x) f64, generateUUIDv4() uuid, toIPv4(x) AS ipv4 FROM numbers_mt(25000000);
test.query: SELECT max({column}) FROM t_filter_column_vector WHERE id < 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT max({column}) FROM t_filter_column_vector WHERE id < 500 FORMAT Null
SELECT max({column}) FROM t_filter_column_vector WHERE id < 900 FORMAT Null
